title: Hot Lava Chicken
description:
Add's the lava chicken from the Minecraft Movie.
I just did this as a project for fun :)
body:
Enhance your chicken farm with the Hot Lava Chicken Mod

Features:
- Craftable Lava Chicken, with a Lava Bucket and Raw Chicken
- Immune to Fire

Another way to create Lava Chicken is to pour lava on a chicken.
